name: GARDNER SYNDROME
definition: autosomal dominant disease with variable penetrance as a variant of familial adenomatous
discriminating_features: multiple colonic polyps appearing during puberty, increasing in number during 3rd-4th

general: multiple colonic polyps appearing during puberty, increasing in number during 3rd-4th
Long bones: may have solid periosteal cortical thickening
wavy cortical thickening of superior aspect of ribs
osteomas / exostoses may protrude from periosteal surface
Teeth: tendency toward numerous caries → dental prosthesis at early age

clinical.Cx: small bowel / colonic obstruction; malignant transformation
clinical.Prognosis: frequent recurrence (⅓) after resection / radiation therapy
clinical.Rx: prophylactic total colectomy at about 20 years of age
